data.title: Hibiki Path Advisors wants Tomoe Corp. to overhaul management plan. Invested since last year. Shares acquired.
data.description: A Singapore-based investment management company named Hibiki Path Advisors manages capital for clients in Japan and overseas with a long-term focus. They started purchasing shares of Tomoe Corporation last year and have upheld this investment since. With the aim of enhancing corporate value and optimizing shareholder interests, they have submitted a shareholder proposal.

data.title: Apple removed ICE tracking apps like ICEBlock from App Store due to safety risks, following Pam Bondi's warning.
data.description: Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) has recently taken action to remove apps, including ICEBlock, from its App Store. ICEBlock, developed in April, allowed users to track the location of Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) officers within a five-mile radius. This decision was made due to safety concerns, with Apple not immediately responding to requests for comment. Attorney General Pam Bondi urged for the removal of ICEBlock, citing risks to ICE agents and potential encouragement of violence against law enforcement. This news has caused discussions on the role of technology in law enforcement and safety measures. For more information, visit authorized sources.

data.title: MBZUAI and MIT Schwarzman College of Computing partner for AI research collaboration, aiming to advance AI in science and health.
data.description: In Abu Dhabi, UAE, on October 3, 2025, the Mohamed bin Zayed University of Artificial Intelligence (MBZUAI) and the MIT Schwarzman College of Computing have joined forces to combine cutting-edge AI developments in scientific exploration, human well-being, and environmental sustainability. This partnership aims to leverage the latest innovations in AI for the benefit of society.

data.title: Cregis and KuCoin hold Institutional Web3 Forum in Singapore on Sep 30, 2025, with over 300 industry decision-makers.
data.description: In Singapore on September 30, 2025, Cregis and KuCoin Institutional organized the "Institutional Web3 Forum: Secure. Efficient. Compliant," gathering more than 300 key players in the industry. The event focused on topics like stablecoins, payments, and ensuring security, efficiency, and compliance.

data.title: Quantum Machines announces AQC25 event in 2025 gathering top minds to advance adaptive quantum methods in Boston.
data.description: Academic professionals, researchers from national laboratories, emerging startups, and influential tech leaders gather at AQC25 in Boston on October 3, 2025, for collaborative discussions. The event showcases innovative advancements, tackles obstacles, and outlines strategies for achieving scalable calibration, error correction, and practical applications in quantum computing. The conference, organized by Quantum Machines, brings together a diverse audience to drive progress in this rapidly-evolving field.
